scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.ci:install: npm ci && npm ci --prefix server && npm ci --prefix client
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
